AddressInfo.Title: AC at BMW Muratie Wine Estate
AddressInfo.AccessComments:
Hours:
Mon - Sun: 08:00 - 18:00

Charging Hours: Only within trading hours

GeneralComments:
Muratie Wine Estate, situated in the spectacular Knorhoek Valley near Stellenbosch, is one of South Africa's most storied wine farms. Muratie has a rich historical heritage spanning 340 years but also embraces the future. Come taste our world-class wines, have a farm lunch, and explore our mountain bike or running/hiking trails whilst making use of the EV charging facilities provided.
